data.markdown:
THE SAVANT EXPERIENCE

SAVANT POWER

SAVANT HOME

[Get Started](https://www.savant.com/get-savant/)

SIGN IN

## THE SAVANT POWER SYSTEM

The Ultimate Energy Management Solution

[Start a Project](https://www.savant.com/power/getting-started/)

## POWERFUL, SIMPLE, SCALABLE

The Savant Power System delivers the ultimate solution for home energy management. Monitor production and usage trends, control circuits at the distribution panel, and manage solar, battery, or generator backup sources all via the award winning Savant App. Our systems scale to meet the needs of any site from single family homes to large installations. Offset peak utility rates, keep stored power flowing to where it’s needed during grid outages, and optimize overall energy usage - contributing to a more sustainable future for all.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='1042'%20width='2089'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/609f03d57f64dff1ed6c6cf3e0cba6a3/12dc6/family_shot.png)

1. Savant Power Storage
2. Electrical Panel with Savant Power Modules
3. Savant Level 2 EV Charger

```

```

Compact, elegant, and efficient. The Savant Power System uses some or all of just a few key components: Savant Power Modules, Savant’s Hybrid Inverter, Savant Power Storage, and Savant’s Level 2 EV Charger. From small systems to large installations, with these key elements working together in harmony and managed by Savant’s advanced automation software we can deliver smart energy that’s truly ahead of the class.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='802'%20width='391'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/2d814626b296319e8bc57f08e6d6e173/46453/power_flow_phone.png)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='520'%20width='1680'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/368eafdb84e1ae64bc41230c27121feb/edde2/garage_b_volvo_battery_update.0001_2_1.png)

## ELEVATE YOUR ENERGY

Experience unparalleled energy management with the world’s most advanced smart home application, the Savant app. Begin your journey by monitoring just a few circuits and easily expand to a comprehensive home energy management system, including solar, generator, and battery backup. Gain valuable insights into your power usage over time and optimize your energy consumption. With Savant's innovative Scenes feature, seamlessly automate climate, lighting, security, and power settings based on real-time availability.

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='656.0000000000001'%20width='370'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/92997a4327115bb1836e70153f5a833d/d1563/scenes4b_1.png)

Set Conditions for Power Sources

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='656.0000000000001'%20width='370'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/b8f97df1a8e7b21eaa3f4705086b26b1/d1563/loadcontrol_1.png)

Budget Off-Grid Loads

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='668'%20width='376'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/f8299b846d7ab181566403744ad57b28/001f1/messagecenter_2.png)

Gain Everyday Insights

## ELECTRIFY YOUR LIFE

See how the Savant Power System helps to manage a variety of power resources, including solar, battery and back-up generator power. Experience reduced dependency on the power grid and seamless power management during an unplanned grid outage.

[Take a Tour](https://www.savant-power-systems-tour.com/)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='1386'%20width='1386'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/96c2ee6d530be9448b7cfc14c8dd10ef/41102/static.png)

## IT STARTS AT THE PANEL

Affordable, modular and compatible with all major electrical panels, Savant's Power Modules deliver precise energy monitoring and instant outage detection. If your home has an automatic generator or battery storage, Savant Power Modules allow you to tailor the circuits being powered during a grid outage, because the real critical loads are the ones you need right now.

[Learn More](https://www.savant.com/power/smart-panel/)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='2304'%20width='2145'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/b37622b2be7e54ba9a6a57471e4911f9/38644/ps20-ps50_garage_light_1.png)

## Gain Everyday Insights

The Savant PS20 and PS50 offer smart, easy-to-install, and scalable power backup solutions. Our energy storage systems are compatible with service sizes ranging from 200A to 800A and can store between 20kWh and 500kWh of power.

[Learn More](https://www.savant.com/power/storage-systems/)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='1386'%20width='1386'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/ffaa5904a51a9cd0d8e82c16854800c4/41102/charger.png)

## SMART CHARGING

Stunning and powerful, the Savant Level 2 EV Charger is beautifully designed, rain tight, and feature rich. Convenient and rapid at-home charging for your electric vehicle that also lets you monitor energy consumption trends, manage power, and more right from the Savant app.

[Learn More](https://www.savant.com/power/ev-charger/)

![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg%20height='4096'%20width='4096'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![](https://www.savant.com/static/45267111f752208ecaf9d29f49696ec0/40b39/power_system_monitor.jpg)

## REVENUE GRADE MONITORING

Savant Power Modules, Current Track Modules, Directors, and Power System Monitors are capable of revenue grade power monitoring. This means that you can monetarily quantify how much power you’re using at the individual circuit level.

[Learn More](https://www.savant.com/power/savant-app/)

# Starting a project? Let's talk.

Lead SourceSavant Website \| https://www.savant.com/power/Lead Record TypeSavant Services Request

Savant now offers **personal smart home consultations** to help you start your project quickly and smoothly.

All we need is your contact info and some details on what you are interested in so we can match you up with the perfect Savant install consultant.

Do you have Savant in your home already?
